name: Andean Resources Limited
description: Andean Resources Limited was an Australian-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold and silver projects in South America. The company's flagship asset was the Cerro Negro gold-silver project located in the Santa Cruz province of Argentina, which is recognized as a high-grade, low-cost gold and silver deposit. In 2010, Andean Resources was acquired by Goldcorp Inc. (now part of Newmont Corporation) for approximately CAD 3.6 billion, which integrated the Cerro Negro project into Goldcorp's global mining portfolio.
